rationale: Educ. Code §49.310 governs chief appraiser duties regarding detachment/annexation and reporting to the commissioner. It does not reference homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote: The chief appraiser of each appraisal district shall cooperate with the commissioner in administering this subchapter.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts; no conflict identified.
